zh.Llantwit Major, Vale Of Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯瓦爾 本 格拉莫爾根利藍特維特 梅傑
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ynyr ap Cadfarch於大約0870年出生在威爾士丹比爾時，他的父親Cadfarch ap Gwrgant27歲，母親Lydocca ferch Cadfarch29歲。他於0900年與Rheingar ferch Lluddoca在威爾士丹比爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於0949年在英國威爾斯享年80歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯瓦爾 本 格拉莫爾根利藍特維特 梅傑。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Ynyr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: pronounced ‘inn-eer’, probably from the Latin name Honorius (a derivative of honor ‘renown’).

en.lifeSummary: When Ynyr ap Cadfarch was born about 0870, in Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Cadfarch ap Gwrgant, was 27 and his mother, Lydocca ferch Cadfarch, was 29. He married Rheingar ferch Lluddoca in 0900, in Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 0949, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Llantwit Major, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Rheingar ferch Lluddoca en 0900, à Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 0949, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Llantwit Major, Vale of Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

ja.Denbighshire, Wales: ウェールズデンビグhシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ynyr ap Cadfarchが約0870年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Cadfarch ap Gwrgantは27歳，母Lydocca ferch Cadfarchは29歳であった。0900年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでRheingar ferch Lluddocaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は0949年にイギリスウェールズで80歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズベル オフ グラモーガンラントウィト マジャーにて埋葬された。

ko.Llantwit Major, Vale Of Glamorgan, Wales: 영국 웨일스 발 프 글램르건 랜트윗 마조르
ko.lifeSummary: Ynyr ap Cadfarch(이)가 대략 0870년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cadfarch ap Gwrgant(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydocca ferch Cadfarch(은)는 29세였다. 그는 0900년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Rheingar ferch Lluddoca(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 0949년 영국 웨일스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 발 프 글램르건 랜트윗 마조르에 묻혔다.

ru.Llantwit Major, Vale Of Glamorgan, Wales: ллантвит маджор, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ynyr ap Cadfarch родился около 0870 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cadfarch ap Gwrgant было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lydocca ferch Cadfarch, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Rheingar ferch Lluddoca в 0900 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 0949 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантвит маджор, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.
